code:
%%{Groupware_IssueTracker}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Groupware_WikiPage)

[Groupware_ChatRoom] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Groupware_IssueTracker)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Groupware_WikiPage)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Groupware_WikiPage] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Groupware_WikiPage的Hub同步机制画一个状态图。核心场景是当本地hub检测到与federation的状态分歧时，整个同步流程应该怎么走。起点我想定为Groupware_ChatRoom触发同步请求。
明白了。那OUT_OF_SYNC状态需要标注具体的触发条件吗？比如CRDT frame过期、网络拓扑变化这些。另外，同步请求是从SprintBacklog过来的，这个事件命名用SyncRequested可以吗？
可以，SyncRequested没问题。OUT_OF_SYNC的note里把这三点列清楚：stale CRDT frame、missing contributions or metrics、还有network topology change。接下来进入FETCH_REMOTE，从federation peers拉取最新的CRDT vector clocks。
好的，FETCH_REMOTE的note我写的是"Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs from federation peers (Groupware_IssueTracker)"。然后FrameDownloaded之后进入MERGE状态，应用CRDT merge function做确定性冲突解决。
MERGE之后需要VALIDATE，做schema校验和hash完整性检查，还要verify signatures from remote hubs。验证通过才到SYNCED，最终回到Groupware_SprintBacklog。但这里得考虑异常路径——网络超时、认证失败、冲突未解决这些情况。
异常路径我梳理一下：FETCH_REMOTE可能NetworkTimeout或AuthError到FAILED；MERGE可能ConflictUnresolved到FAILED；VALIDATE可能HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid到FAILED。FAILED之后应该能重试吧？
对，FAILED -- RETRY -- OUT_OF_SYNC形成重试循环。另外补充维护场景：SYNCED可以因为PeriodicSync或ParamChange回到OUT_OF_SYNC；还有DEGRADED状态，当HubOffline或LatencyHigh时从OUT_OF_SYNC进入，最终EscalatedToOps到Groupware_WikiPage。
结构都画好了。最后我把核心状态用橙色高亮：OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY、DEGRADED。标题定为SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Groupware_WikiPage)，你看可以吗？
没问题，这个状态流转完整覆盖了正常同步、异常恢复和运维降级三个场景。Groupware_IssueTracker作为远程数据源、Groupware_SprintBacklog作为触发和归宿、Groupware_WikiPage作为运维入口，角色都很清晰。可以定稿了。
